Functions
BitField_Initialize
void BitField_Initialize()

Initialize bit field (set all bits to 0)

u8 var
)

Set a given bit

Parameters
var
u8

Bit number to set

BitField_Disable
void BitField_Disable(
u8 var
)

Reset a given bit

Parameters
var
u8

Bit number to reset

BitField_Set
inline void BitField_Set(
u8 var,
bool enable
)

Set or reset a given bit

Parameters
var
u8

Bit number to set

enable
bool

TRUE to enable, FALSE to disable

BitField_Toggle
void BitField_Toggle(
u8 var
)

Toggle a given bit

Parameters
var
u8

Bit number to toggle

BitField_Get
bool BitField_Get(
u8 var
)

Get a given bit

Parameters
var
u8

Bit number to get

Return

FALSE if bit is not set

BitField_GetBitNumber
inline u16 BitField_GetBitNumber()

Get the number of bits that fit in the bit field

BitField_GetSize
inline u16 BitField_GetSize()

Get the size of the bit field in bytes

BitField_GetData
inline u8* BitField_GetData()

Get bit field raw data

Return

Raw data of the bit field
